_meta.purpose: Display-ready profile data for all firm pages. Used by firm-loader.js to populate the profile section, AI summary, and hero CTA. Separate from firm-rules.json (which holds pricing/rules data).

lucid_trading.name: Lucid Trading
lucid_trading.summary: Lucid Trading is a futures prop trading firm launched in 2025 that provides traders with a fast and transparent path to funded accounts. Traders can either pass a single-phase evaluation or choose direct-to-funded accounts to begin earning payouts immediately. The firm focuses on CME futures markets and supports popular platforms such as Tradovate, Rithmic, and NinjaTrader. Lucid Trading is known for instant account activation, very fast payouts, flexible end-of-day drawdown rules, and profit splits of up to 90% for traders.
lucid_trading.hero_description:
Lucid Trading Company focuses on keeping prop trading simple and transparent. The firm offers multiple account plans designed to fit different budgets and trading styles, without overcomplicating the process. With low profit targets, no activation fees, and same-day payouts, Lucid Trading removes many of the common barriers traders face when getting funded.

Everything is built around clarity and ease of use, making it a solid option for traders who want a straightforward, no-nonsense funding experience with fast access to their profits. Overall, Lucid Trading Company delivers a reliable and accessible path for traders who value simplicity.

tradeify.name: Tradeify
tradeify.summary: Tradeify is a futures prop trading firm offering fast evaluation and instant funding programs for traders. The firm provides simulated funded accounts with capital scaling up to $750,000 and allows traders to keep up to 90% of their profits. Traders can access markets through platforms like Tradovate and WealthCharts while trading major CME futures contracts. Tradeify is known for its quick evaluation process, flexible funding models, automated payouts, and a structured path to live capital after consistent payouts.
tradeify.hero_description:
Tradeify is a familiar and trusted name in the prop trading space, and it's come back stronger than ever. The firm offers flexible funding options and a streamlined account structure built around what traders actually want. With both instant funding and customizable setups through the new Select Plan, Tradeify lets traders tailor their accounts instead of forcing them into a one-size-fits-all model.

Traders can choose the features that matter most to them, including day-one or five-day payout options, giving more control over how and when profits are accessed. With refreshed programs and the same reliable, trader-focused support, Tradeify delivers a versatile, accessible, and efficient path for traders looking to get funded and stay funded.

myfundedfutures.name: MyFundedFutures
myfundedfutures.summary: MyFundedFutures is a futures proprietary trading firm that provides traders with simulated funded accounts after passing a one-step evaluation challenge. Traders can access account sizes such as $50K, $100K, and $150K while trading popular CME futures markets. The firm is known for flexible rules, no strict daily loss limits on many plans, and fast payouts through its Rapid plan. With the ability to get funded in as little as two trading days and request payouts frequently, MyFundedFutures has become one of the most popular futures prop firms for active traders.
myfundedfutures.hero_description:
My Funded Futures is a solid addition to OnlyPropFirms, especially for traders who value flexibility and strong support. The firm offers several trader-first features designed to improve the overall trading experience. One standout is their trailing maximum end-of-trade drawdown, a structure that's still relatively rare in the prop firm space and gives traders more clarity around risk.

My Funded Futures also delivers a clean, easy-to-use trader dashboard and supports daily withdrawals, so accessing profits is simple and efficient. What really sets them apart, though, is their customer support—boasting an average 10-second human response time, which is almost unheard of in this industry.

If you're looking for a firm that genuinely puts traders first, My Funded Futures is absolutely worth checking out.

alpha_futures.name: Alpha Futures
alpha_futures.summary: Alpha Futures, founded in 2022 in the United States, is a premier futures proprietary trading firm offering a transparent 1-Step evaluation model. Account sizes range from $25,000 up to $400,000 with flexible scaling. Traders get direct market access via Rithmic & Tradovate, plus TradingView integration. The firm focuses on E-mini S&P 500, Nasdaq-100, Gold, Oil, and Micro Futures. Payouts processed bi-weekly with profit splits up to 90%. Alpha Futures supports advanced trading rules, no minimum trading days, and a 100% refund on first evaluation fee after first payout.
alpha_futures.hero_description:
AlphaFutures is a familiar and trusted name in the prop trading space, and it's come back stronger than ever. The firm offers flexible funding options and a streamlined account structure built around what traders actually want. With both instant funding and customizable setups through the new Select Plan, AlphaFutures lets traders tailor their accounts instead of forcing them into a one-size-fits-all model.

Traders can choose the features that matter most to them, including day-one or five-day payout options, giving more control over how and when profits are accessed. With refreshed programs and the same reliable, trader-focused support, AlphaFutures delivers a versatile, accessible, and efficient path for traders looking to get funded and stay funded.

top_one_futures.name: Top One Futures
top_one_futures.summary: Top One Futures, founded in early 2023 in the United States, is a next-generation proprietary trading firm built for serious futures traders. With a cutting-edge 1-Step evaluation model and account sizes ranging from $25,000 to $500,000, traders get unparalleled flexibility. Direct market access via Rithmic, Tradovate, and CQG, plus full TradingView integration. The firm specializes in E-mini S&P 500, Nasdaq-100, Gold, Crude Oil, and Micro Futures contracts. Payouts are processed bi-weekly with profit splits reaching 90% after scaling milestones. Top One Futures offers no minimum trading days, weekend holding allowed, and a full refund of evaluation fees after the first payout.
top_one_futures.hero_description:
Top One Futures is a rapidly growing name in the prop trading space, delivering unmatched flexibility and modern infrastructure. The firm offers instant funding options and a fully customizable evaluation structure. With both 1-step and advanced scaling plans, Top One Futures allows traders to choose what fits their style instead of rigid one-size-fits-all models.

Traders can select payout cadences, daily loss buffers, and even choose from multiple data feeds (Rithmic, Tradovate). With 90% profit splits, no consistency rules, and lightning-fast payouts, Top One Futures provides a genuine, trader-first path to long-term funding success.

apex_trader_funding.name: Apex Trader Funding
apex_trader_funding.summary: Apex Trader Funding, established in January 2021 in the United States, is a futures-focused prop firm offering a 1-Step evaluation program. Account sizes range from $25,000 to $300,000. Supported platforms include Tradovate, Rithmic, TradingView, NinjaTrader, Quantower, Sierra Chart and more. Traders can access major futures like E-mini S&P 500, NASDAQ 100, and Mini-DOW.
apex_trader_funding.hero_description:
Apex Trader Funding is a familiar and trusted name in the prop trading space, and it's come back stronger than ever. The firm offers flexible funding options and a streamlined account structure built around what traders actually want. With both instant funding and customizable setups through the new Select Plan, Apex Trader Funding lets traders tailor their accounts instead of forcing them into a one-size-fits-all model.

Traders can choose the features that matter most to them, including day-one or five-day payout options, giving more control over how and when profits are accessed. With refreshed programs and the same reliable, trader-focused support, Apex Trader Funding delivers a versatile, accessible, and efficient path for traders looking to get funded and stay funded.

phidias.name: Phidias PropFirm
phidias.summary: Phidias PropFirm offers a streamlined 1-step evaluation with account sizes from $25K up to $150K. Evaluation costs range $44–$225, with zero activation fees on OTP plans or $149–169 activation. True cost between $55–$397. Profit target is 6% with EOD trailing / static drawdown between $500–$4,500. Minimum trading days: 3. Max accounts: 15, total allocation up to $1.6M. Profit split 80–90%. Highly rated ~4.9⭐ with exclusive discount code BROTRADING.
phidias.hero_description: Phidias PropFirm offers one of the most competitive 1-step evaluation models with low starting costs, fast 3-day minimum to pass, and a generous profit split up to 90%. With EOD trailing drawdown and no hidden scaling tricks, traders can scale up to $1.6M across 15 accounts. Simple, transparent, and backed by excellent user ratings. Get started with code BROTRADING and save big.

daytraders.name: DayTraders
daytraders.summary: DayTraders is a futures prop trading firm offering a simple evaluation model for traders who want access to funded futures accounts. Traders can qualify for accounts ranging from $25,000 to $300,000 while trading popular CME futures markets such as the E-mini S&P 500, NASDAQ, and Crude Oil. The firm supports professional trading platforms including Tradovate and Rithmic. With flexible scaling, structured risk rules, and competitive profit splits, DayTraders provides an accessible pathway for traders looking to trade funded capital in the futures market.
daytraders.hero_description:
Day Traders is a familiar and trusted name in the prop trading space, and it's come back stronger than ever. The firm offers flexible funding options and a streamlined account structure built around what traders actually want. With both instant funding and customizable setups through the new Select Plan, Day Traders lets traders tailor their accounts instead of forcing them into a one-size-fits-all model.

nexgen_pro_trader.name: NexGen Funding
nexgen_pro_trader.summary: Nexgen ProTrader Funding offers futures funding with a focus on trader-friendly rules: Closed Trade Drawdown (never limited by unrealized losses), no daily loss limits, and lightning-fast payouts. Choose from Evaluation accounts (1-day pass, $149–$249) or Instant Funding accounts (start trading immediately, $299–$399). Account sizes from $25K to $150K with up to 10 accounts, profit split up to 100% after 16 payouts. No activation fee time limits, no inactivity rule, and payouts every 8 trading days. Highly rated ~4.6.
nexgen_pro_trader.hero_description:
NexGen Funding is a familiar and trusted name in the prop trading space, and it's come back stronger than ever. The firm offers flexible funding options and a streamlined account structure built around what traders actually want. With both instant funding and customizable setups through the new Select Plan, NexGen Funding lets traders tailor their accounts instead of forcing them into a one-size-fits-all model.

Traders can choose the features that matter most to them, including day-one or five-day payout options, giving more control over how and when profits are accessed. yrm_prop.name: YRM Prop
yrm_prop.summary: YRM Prop is a proprietary trading firm dedicated to futures traders. Account sizes range from $25,000 to $150,000 across two plans: Starter (1-step evaluation, EOD drawdown, 90/10 payout split) and Instant Prime (straight-to-funded, EOD drawdown, minimum 8 trading days before payout). Consistency rules apply: 50% on Starter evaluations, 20% on Instant Prime. Use code BRO for the exclusive Bro Trading affiliate discount.
yrm_prop.hero_description:
YRM Prop is a rapidly growing name in the prop trading space, delivering unmatched flexibility and modern infrastructure. The firm offers instant funding options and a fully customizable evaluation structure. With both 1-step and advanced scaling plans, YRM Prop allows traders to choose what fits their style instead of rigid one-size-fits-all models.

Traders can select payout cadences, daily loss buffers, and even choose from multiple data feeds (Rithmic, Tradovate, MetaTrader). With up to 90% profit splits, no consistency rules, and lightning-fast payouts, YRM Prop provides a genuine, trader-first path to long-term funding success.

fundedseat.name: FundedSeat
fundedseat.summary: FundedSeat, operated by Cygnus Software Solutions LLC in Sheridan, Wyoming, is a futures-focused prop firm offering a wide range of evaluation and instant funding plans. Traders can choose from four 1-Step Evaluation variants — Daily (35%), Daily (50%), Daily Pro, and Sprint — as well as two Instant Funded options: Direct and Bolt. All plans use End-of-Day (EOD) drawdown and offer a 90/10 payout split. Supported platforms include Rithmic with a broad selection of charting tools such as Quantower, Sierra Chart, Bookmap, ATAS, and MotiveWave. With discount code BRO, traders receive 60% off all plans.
fundedseat.hero_description:
FundedSeat stands out in the futures prop trading space with one of the most flexible plan lineups available. Whether you prefer a structured evaluation or want to start trading with real capital immediately, FundedSeat has you covered with four evaluation variants and two instant funding options.

With a 90/10 payout split, EOD drawdown protection, and support for top-tier platforms like Rithmic, Quantower, Sierra Chart, Bookmap, and ATAS, FundedSeat gives traders the tools they need to succeed. Use code BRO for 60% off any plan and get started today.
